metadata.description: PolymorphicBlocks Abstract Blocks for hierarchical structural design

tier_levels.system: System-level blocks - commonly used at top-level design (e.g., power sources, controllers, major interfaces)
tier_levels.subsystem: Subsystem-level blocks - intermediate functional modules (e.g., specific regulators, sensors, drivers)
tier_levels.functional: Functional-level blocks - lower-level components and circuits (e.g., filters, switches, amplifiers)

power.name: VoltageLink
power.description: Power supply connection with voltage source and sinks

canlogic.name: CanLogicLink
canlogic.description: Logic level CAN link, RXD and TXD signals

candiff.name: CanDiffLink
candiff.description: Differential CAN link, CANH and CANL signals

dvp8.name: Dvp8Link
dvp8.description: DVP (Digital Video Port) camera link with 8-wide data connection.

i2c.name: I2cLink
i2c.description: I2C connection, using terminology from the authoritative NXP specification

spi.name: SpiLink
spi.description: SPI serial communication with controller/peripheral naming conventions

usbcc.name: UsbCcLink
usbcc.description: USB Type-C CC (Configuration Channel) for role detection, orientation detection, and power delivery negotiation

rf.name: RfLink
rf.description: RF (Radio Frequency) signal connection for wireless communication

interface_types_info.description: Architecture-level interface types (Links) for structural design
interface_types_info.usage: Use these to define high-level connections between modules without specifying exact pin-to-pin wiring

interfaces.name: AnalogSwitch
interfaces.description: Base class for analog switches that can route analog signals between multiple channels

interfaces.name: SolidStateRelay
interfaces.description: Base class for solid state relays.

interfaces.name: IsolatedCanTransceiver
interfaces.description: CAN transceiver with galvanic isolation between CAN bus and controller sides

interfaces.name: SpeakerDriver
interfaces.description: Digital audio amplifier for driving speakers (I2S input)

interfaces.name: IoExpander
interfaces.description: I/O expander chip that provides additional GPIO pins via digital interface

interfaces.name: BitBangAdapter
interfaces.description: Adapters that break out a structured Bundle to component wires, useful when bit-banging those protocols

interfaces.name: DigitalIsolator
interfaces.description: Multichannel digital isolator, shifts logic signals between different logic voltages and isolation domains

connectors.name: BananaJack
connectors.description: Base class for a single terminal 4mm banana jack, such as used on test equipment

connectors.name: RfConnector
connectors.description: Base class for a RF connector, with a signal and ground

connectors.name: UflConnector
connectors.description: Base class for a U.FL / IPEX / UMCC connector, miniature RF connector.

connectors.name: SmaConnector
connectors.description: Base class for a SMA coax connector.

connectors.name: SmaMConnector
connectors.description: Base class for a SMA M connector, pin with internal threads.

connectors.name: SmaFConnector
connectors.description: Base class for a SMA F connector, socket with external threads.

connectors.name: SwdCortexTargetConnector
connectors.description: Programming header with power and SWD (SWCLK/SWDIO/RESET) pins.

connectors.name: FootprintPassiveConnector
connectors.description: PassiveConnector that is a footprint and provides some base functionality for generating connectors

connectors.name: UsbConnector
connectors.description: USB connector base class for USB 2.0/3.0 data and power connections (Type-C CC negotiation handled by specific subclasses)

connectors.name: UsbHostConnector
connectors.description: Abstract base class for a USB 2.0 host-side port connector

connectors.name: UsbDeviceConnector
connectors.description: Abstract base class for a USB 2.0 device-side port connector

clock.name: OscillatorReference
clock.description: Reference oscillator or clock source for timing applications

clock.name: Oscillator
clock.description: Device that generates a digital clock signal given power.

user_interface.name: IndicatorSinkLed
user_interface.description: Abstract part for an low-side-driven ("common anode") indicator LED

user_interface.name: DigitalRotaryEncoder
user_interface.description: Wrapper around RotaryEncoder that provides digital ports that are pulled low when activated

user_interface.name: DigitalDirectionSwitch
user_interface.description: Wrapper around DirectionSwitch that provides digital ports for direction sensing

user_interface.name: Lcd
user_interface.description: LCD display, where pixels absorb / reflect light, but do not directly emit light

user_interface.name: Oled
user_interface.description: OLED display, with the pixel density of an LCD but self-emissive pixels

user_interface.name: EInk
user_interface.description: E-ink display, which retains the image after power is removed.

power.name: VoltageRegulator
power.description: Structural abstract base class for DC-DC voltage regulators with shared ground (non-isolated)

power.name: LinearRegulator
power.description: Structural abstract base class for linear regulators, a voltage regulator that can produce output voltage lower than input voltage

power.name: SwitchingVoltageRegulator
power.description: Switching voltage regulator (buck, boost, or buck-boost converter)

power.name: MotorDriver
power.description: Motor driver for controlling DC, brushed, or brushless motors

power.name: BrushedMotorDriver
power.description: A brushed motor driver, or at least the power stage for one

power.name: BldcDriver
power.description: A brushless motor driver, or at least the power stage for one - may be as simple as 3 half-bridges

power.name: HalfBridgeDriver
power.description: Half-bridge driver with independent low / high control for driving two NMOS devices, with a high-side driver that allows a voltage offset from the main gnd

power.name: HalfBridge
power.description: Half bridge circuit with logic-level inputs and current draw calculated from the output node

analog.name: Opamp
analog.description: Base class for opamps. Parameters need to be more restricted in subclasses.

analog.name: MultipackOpamp
analog.description: Base class for packed opamps - devices that have multiple opamps in a single package, with shared power and ground connections

analog.name: OpampApplication
analog.description: Opamp-based circuits, typically one that perform some function on signals

arrays.name: ResistorArray
arrays.description: An n-element resistor array, where all resistors have the same resistance value

memory.name: SpiMemory
memory.description: Base class for SPI memory, with acceptable sizes (in bits) as a range.

protection.name: CanEsdDiode
protection.description: ESD protection diode for CAN bus differential signals

protection.name: UsbEsdDiode
protection.description: ESD protection diode for USB data lines

controllers.name: Microcontroller
controllers.description: Microcontroller with programmable firmware and various peripheral interfaces

controllers.name: Fpga
controllers.description: FPGA with its surrounding application circuit.

controllers.name: IoController
controllers.description: Structural abstract base class for a programmable controller chip (including microcontrollers and FPGAs)

sensors.name: Accelerometer
sensors.description: Acceleration sensor for measuring linear acceleration

sensors.name: Gyroscope
sensors.description: Gyroscope sensor for measuring angular velocity

sensors.name: GasSensor
sensors.description: Sensors measuring gas concentration, including non-particle IAQ, TVOC, eCO2, and CO2 sensors

sensors.name: LightSensor
sensors.description: Light intensity or ambient light sensor

sensors.name: MagneticSwitch
sensors.description: A switch that is activated by a magnetic field, including omnipolar and bipolar types

sensors.name: Magnetometer
sensors.description: Linear response magnetic field sensor, potentially with multiple axes

sensors.name: Microphone
sensors.description: Microphone for audio input (analog or digital output depending on implementation)

sensors.name: Camera
sensors.description: Imaging sensors, including visible / RGB, IR, and thermal.
